translations: You have bestowed (Your) Favors on them
puzzle.hint: This verse concludes a foundational prayer, distinguishing between the guided and those who went astray.
puzzle.arabic: صِرَٰطَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ ٱلْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
puzzle.verseEn: The path of those upon whom You have bestowed favor, not of those who have earned [Your] anger or of those who are astray.
